concerns.text: The spec contains a surviving '[NEEDS CLARIFICATION]' marker in the Assumptions section: 'Dataset-variable fit is validated: each repository's commit history contains all required variables... or a [NEEDS CLARIFICATION] marker is recorded for missing variables'. Per the kickback routing, a converged spec must have NO surviving [NEEDS CLARIFICATION] markers. The reviser must resolve this by either defining the specific validation logic or removing the placeholder.
